channel.title: Xinhua Han on 韩鑫华
channel.description: Recent content in Xinhua Han on 韩鑫华

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Education#

KU Leuven (QS #60), Belgium | Sep 2023 — Sep 2026 MSc Socio-Cultural Anthropology · Distinction

Courses: Culture, Intimacy & Relatedness; Migration & Mobility; Posthumanist Anthropology; Diversity & Inequality in Language Worlds Thesis: Remaking Meaning: How Chinese Students Reconstruct the Self Through Plural Learning Resources — examining how digital tools reshape cognitive patterns across cultural contexts and building a layered user mental model.

Heidelberg University (QS #80), Germany | Oct 2025 — Mar 2026 Erasmus+ Exchange Student
